reviews.comment:
Marzo 2022: Hace poco tiempo eliminaron la carga de aire (estaba frente al A Full) y la colocaron en los surtidores. El cambio, en mi prespectiva, es incómoda: hace que las filas (de por sí ya extensas) se demoren más de lo necesario. Sería bueno si pudieran rever la decisión.

(Translated by Google)
March 2022: They recently removed the air conditioning (it was in front of the A Full) and placed it at the pumps. The change, in my opinion, is inconvenient: it makes the already long lines take longer than necessary. It would be nice if they could review the decision.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNzhIbDBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los empleados y buen precio. Ahora mal q no te hacen factura A si pagas con la app de ypf. No me parece bien.

(Translated by Google)
Good customer service and good prices. However, it's a shame they don't issue invoices if you pay with the YPF app. I don't think that's right.

reviews.comment:
Nunca más a YPF. Vi como un pibe hizo fila detrás de una traffic que no cargó nafta, se cruzó en perpendicular a los tanques para cargar aire y luego al pibe de la bicicleta no le dejaron inflar una rueda. Eran las 9 de la noche de un feriado. Qué poco tacto tienen.

(Translated by Google)
Never again to YPF. I saw a kid line up behind a van that wasn't filling up with gas, then he crossed perpendicularly to the tanks to get air, and then they wouldn't let the kid on the bicycle inflate his tire. It was 9 pm on a holiday. They have absolutely no tact.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNFpqeEJREAE
